title: CrafterCity3
description:
CrafterCity3
------------
A Survival and Tech Modpack with Custom Blocks, Items and much more!
body:
Crafter City 3 is a tech and adventure modpack that includes mods like Create, Farmers Delight, Biomes o'Plenty and much more!

You can automate everything with Create. Biomes o' Plenty Adds new biomes to explore. Alex Mobs adds new mobs! You can Defend your Base with Security Craft! There are also some smaller mods that adjust the game result!



This modpack is currently in the alpha phase! Some things may still change/mods will be added/removed!
